SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-19-1994, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO JUN-06-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $205.00 FILED BY MAPA, MYRNA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MILLS, GENEVIEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLS, GENEVIEVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAPA, MYRNA $120.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $135.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MAPA, MYRNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MILLS, GENEVIEVE CROSS COMPLAINT DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MAPA, MYRNA
